details.productUrlName: Aang Ascendant Airbender Serra Ascendant Rainbow Foil

customAttributes.description:
Avatar: The Last Airbender: A Lot to Learn

Lifelink
As long as you have 30 or more life, this creature gets +5/+5 and has flying.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair x Avatar: The Last Airbender: A Lot to Learn and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/25/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: “I laugh at gravity all the time. Hahaha, gravity.”
